title: Pabstiella podoglossa
taxonomy: Pabstiella podoglossa belongs to the family Pleurothallidinae, which is a subfamily of orchids. It is classified under the genus Pabstiella, which is a part of the large Orchidaceae family. Within the Orchidaceae family, Pabstiella podoglossa is further categorized under the subfamily Epidendroideae. This species is native to the tropical regions of South America, where it grows in humid and shaded environments. Further classification of Pabstiella podoglossa is still being researched and refined by botanists.
